source.section: 5 - Waypoints > 5.5 - How to Edit Waypoints > b - GRID (MGRS) Coordinates

steps.action: In the HSI page, press the OSB next to DATA.
steps.voiced: On the HSI page, press the OSB next to DATA.

steps.action: You will see the waypoint sequence. We want to edit the coordinates of Waypoint 3.
steps.voiced: Confirm waypoint sequence is visible — select the waypoint to edit.

steps.action: Press the Waypoint Increment/Decrement OSBs to select WYPT 3
steps.voiced: Press the Waypoint Increment or Decrement OSBs to select the target waypoint.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to UFC (Up-Front Controller)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to UFC.

steps.action: On the UFC, press the OSB next to GRID. « : » will appear once selected .
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to GRID on the UFC — confirm colon appears.

steps.action: We will add the grid coordinates of the target as sent by the JTAC: DQ083998 (Note: normal grid coordinates have 6 digits, while PRECISE) grid coordinates have 10 digits.
steps.voiced: Confirm the MGRS grid coordinates from the JTAC — 6-digit normal, 10-digit precise.

steps.action: The HSI display will be replaced by a grid menu. The letters represent grid squares of 100 x 100 km. Since the grid is DQ083998, we will select DQ.
steps.voiced: Confirm grid menu appears on HSI — identify and select the 100 km grid square letters.

steps.action: Verify that TDC is assigned to the right DDI (the TDC Assignment Diamond is shown). 5 - WAYPOINTS
steps.voiced: Confirm TDC is assigned to the DDI showing the grid menu.

steps.action: Press and hold the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller), then slew the TDC cursor over grid "DQ".
steps.voiced: Press and hold TDC, then slew the cursor over the correct grid square.

steps.action: Release TDC when cursor is over "DQ". When "DQ" becomes underlined, it means the grid is selected.
steps.voiced: Release TDC when cursor is over the grid square — confirm it underlines.

steps.action: On the UFC, press « 083998 » to enter the grid coordinates for DQ083998, then press « ENT ».
steps.voiced: Enter the numeric grid coordinates on the UFC, then press ENT.

steps.action: And that's it! You have edited Waypoint 3's coordinates. You would then have to edit elevation… but you already know how to do that, don't you? 5 - WAYPOINTS
steps.voiced: Confirm waypoint coordinates are updated — edit elevation as required.
